title: Spooky Sort It
description: Spooky Sort It! is a mind-sharpening brain puzzle that challenges you to sort a variety of haunting balls into the right tubes. As you tackle these spectral twists and turns, youll not only enhance your problem-solving skills but also find a delightful way to cope with stress and refresh your mind in the captivating world of spectral sorting.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game
